revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Zen Buddhism/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Zen Buddhism/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Zen Buddhism/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Zen Buddhism/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Zen Buddhism/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Zen Buddhism/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23697958099|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}}
=== Usage === This template can be invoked as follows:
:'''<nowiki>{{Zen Buddhism}}</nowiki>''' — ''transcludes the template as shown here.''
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Buddhism templates]] [[Category:Buddhism in Japan templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
